# workbench_data_collection (Data Source)

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "workbench_data_collection" "my_data_collection" {
  id = "12345678-9012-3456-7890-123456789012"
}

output "my_data_collection" {
  value = data.workbench_data_collection.my_data_collection
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Workbench datacollection unique identifier

### Read-Only

- `aws_account_id` (String) AWS account ID associated with the data collection (if AWS workspace)
- `created_by` (String) Workbench data collection created by
- `created_date` (String) Workbench data collection created date
- `description` (String) Workbench datacollection description
- `display_name` (String) Workbench datacollection display name
- `gcp_project_id` (String) GCP project ID associated with the data collection (if GCP workspace)
- `last_updated_by` (String) Workbench data collection last updated by
- `last_updated_date` (String) Workbench data collection last updated date
- `location` (String) Workbench datacollection default resource location
- `organization_id` (String) Workbench datacollection organization id
- `organization_name` (String) Organization name maintaining this Data Collection
- `pod_id` (String) Workbench datacollection pod id
- `policies` (Attributes Set) Workbench datacollection policies (see
  [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))
- `properties` (Attributes Set) Workbench data collection properties in key-value pair (see
  [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--properties))
- `support_email` (String) Support email for the maintainer of this Data Collection
- `therapeutic_tags` (Set of String) Therapeutic tags for this Data Collection
- `update_frequency` (String) Data Update frequency for this data collection
- `user_facing_id` (String) Workbench datacollection user facing id

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>

### Nested Schema for `policies`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the policy
- `namespace` (String) Namespace of the policy

Optional:

- `additional_data` (Attributes Set) Additional data for the policy (see
  [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies--additional_data))

<a id="nestedatt--policies--additional_data"></a>

### Nested Schema for `policies.additional_data`

Required:

- `key` (String) Key of the additional data
- `value` (String) Value of the additional data

<a id="nestedatt--properties"></a>

### Nested Schema for `properties`

Required:

- `key` (String) Key of the property
- `value` (String) Value of the property
